_comment: PDF files are named by Advanced pacing guide chapter numbers (e.g. 6_8_1.pdf = Adv Ch8 L1 = Ratios). Honors class looks up PDFs directly by its own lesson numbers — no mapping needed. Grade-level class uses different chapter numbers for the same content, so its lessons must be remapped to the advanced chapter numbers where the PDFs live. Null means no PDF exists; lesson_pdf.py falls back to text-only generation.

grade_level._comment_ch1_2: Chapters 1-2 identical in both courses — direct lookup works, no mapping needed
grade_level._comment_ch3: GL Ch3 = Ratios/Rates — content lives in Adv Ch8 PDFs
grade_level._comment_ch4: GL Ch4 = Percents — content lives in Adv Ch9 PDFs (9.1-9.3 match; 4.4 closest to 9.3)
grade_level._comment_ch5: GL Ch5 = Expressions — content lives in Adv Ch6 PDFs (5.4 Factoring -> 6.5)
grade_level._comment_ch6: GL Ch6 = Equations — content lives in Adv Ch7 PDFs
grade_level._comment_ch7: GL Ch7 = Geometry — content lives in Adv Ch10 PDFs
grade_level._comment_ch8: GL Ch8 = Integers/Coordinate Plane — content lives in Adv Ch3 PDFs (8.7 Inequalities -> Adv 7.5)
grade_level._comment_ch9: GL Ch9 = Statistics — content lives in Adv Ch12 PDFs
grade_level._comment_ch10: GL Ch10 = Stats part 2 — content lives in Adv Ch13 PDFs
